name: Cartesian Growth Corporation II Class A Ordinary Shares
summary: Cartesian Growth Corporation II is a blank check company (SPAC) formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, capital stock exchange, asset acquisition, stock purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses. The company's efforts to identify a target business will not be limited to a particular industry or geographic region. Cartesian Growth Corporation II is sponsored by Cartesian Capital Group.
